title: Depower and reinitialise hybrid electric vehicles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Depower and reinitialise hybrid electric vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to depower and reinitialise HEV and PHEV

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions 1.2 Workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications are accessed and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed according to safety requirements and AS 5732 Electric vehicle operations - Maintenance and repair1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Vehicle is identified with warning tags or sign to indicate potential hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions 1.2 Workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications are accessed and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed according to safety requirements and AS 5732 Electric vehicle operations - Maintenance and repair1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Vehicle is identified with warning tags or sign to indicate potential hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions 1.2 Workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications are accessed and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed according to safety requirements and AS 5732 Electric vehicle operations - Maintenance and repair1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Vehicle is identified with warning tags or sign to indicate potential hazards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to depower and reinitialise HEV and PHEV

elements.title: Deactivate vehicle RESS

pcs.text: SELV supply is located and disconnected according to manufacturer specifications2.2 RESS service plug or manual service disconnect is located and removed to depower vehicle HV RESS according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Vehicle is stabilised and checked for zero residual voltage according to manufacturer procedures2.4 RESS service plug or manual service disconnect is secured and retained to prevent refitting by third party
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can SELV supply is located and disconnected according to manufacturer specifications2.2 RESS service plug or manual service disconnect is located and removed to depower vehicle HV RESS according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Vehicle is stabilised and checked for zero residual voltage according to manufacturer procedures2.4 RESS service plug or manual service disconnect is secured and retained to prevent refitting by third party?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can SELV supply is located and disconnected according to manufacturer specifications2.2 RESS service plug or manual service disconnect is located and removed to depower vehicle HV RESS according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Vehicle is stabilised and checked for zero residual voltage according to manufacturer procedures2.4 RESS service plug or manual service disconnect is secured and retained to prevent refitting by third party.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Deactivate vehicle RESS

elements.title: Reinitialise vehicle RESS

pcs.text: SELV and RESS service plug or manual service disconnect are reconnected in the correct order and vehicle is reactivated3.2 Diagnostic and testing equipment is used to check and recalibrate subsystems affected by depower process as required3.3 RESS and vehicle subsystems are checked for correct operation3.4 Post-reactivation faults are reported according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can SELV and RESS service plug or manual service disconnect are reconnected in the correct order and vehicle is reactivated3.2 Diagnostic and testing equipment is used to check and recalibrate subsystems affected by depower process as required3.3 RESS and vehicle subsystems are checked for correct operation3.4 Post-reactivation faults are reported according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can SELV and RESS service plug or manual service disconnect are reconnected in the correct order and vehicle is reactivated3.2 Diagnostic and testing equipment is used to check and recalibrate subsystems affected by depower process as required3.3 RESS and vehicle subsystems are checked for correct operation3.4 Post-reactivation faults are reported according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Reinitialise vehicle RESS

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored and any faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and isolated according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored and any faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and isolated according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored and any faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and isolated according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
